hooks.command: echo '{"hookSpecificOutput": {"hookEventName": "PreToolUse", "permissionDecision": "deny", "permissionDecisionReason": "execute_sql is NOT allowed. Use execute_sql_read_only instead."}}'
terminal-notifier -title "Claude Code" -message "Waiting for your response..." -sound default

[ -n "$TMUX" ] && { tmux set-window-option -t "$TMUX_PANE" window-status-style 'bg=green,fg=black'; tmux set-window-option -t "$TMUX_PANE" window-status-current-style 'bg=green,fg=black'; } 2>/dev/null; true

[ -n "$TMUX" ] && { tmux set-window-option -t "$TMUX_PANE" window-status-style 'bg=yellow,fg=black'; tmux set-window-option -t "$TMUX_PANE" window-status-current-style 'bg=yellow,fg=black'; } 2>/dev/null; true
[ -n "$TMUX" ] && { tmux set-window-option -t "$TMUX_PANE" -u window-status-style; tmux set-window-option -t "$TMUX_PANE" -u window-status-current-style; } 2>/dev/null; true
